content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 WARN — RatingGateView.swift:19-24 implements a review gate: users rating ≥4 stars are sent to the App Store write-review URL while lower ratings are diverted to a private feedback form, plus description.txt:2 says "rate us 5 stars!"
Pierre: Apple's 5.6.1/5.6.3 explicitly prohibit filtering reviewers by sentiment and using custom UI to route only happy users to the App Store — this is a classic review-manipulation dark pattern and near-certain rejection. Replace the `itms-apps://...write-review` deep link and star gate with the neutral `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview` API (which shows to all users equally) and remove the "rate us 5 stars!" solicitation from the description.
